name: Pineapple Upside-Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a Bread 'N Cake Bake pan.
2. Mix the cake mix according to package instructions, using pineapple juice as part of the liquid.
3. Melt the butter.
4. Stir the brown sugar into the melted butter and pour it evenly into the bottom of the baking pan.
5. Spread the pineapple slices and Maraschino cherries over the brown sugar layer.
6. Pour in the cake batter, covering the pan.
7. Cover the pan and place it in a slow cooker.
8. Cook on HIGH for 2-1/2 to 3-1/2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove the cake from the slow cooker and immediately invert it onto a large platter.
10. Cut into slices for serving.
